old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.14","title":"posting.rs: .unwrap() on header parse in list_conversations","description":"File: src/posting.rs (list_conversations, pagination link header). The code calls 'link.parse().unwrap()' when inserting the Link header into the response. If pagination_link_header ever returns a string with invalid header characters (e.g., non-ASCII in a URL), this will panic on a network-reachable code path. Should use .map_err() or filter invalid values.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:14.430899412Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:14.430899412Z","labels":["rust-idiom","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.14","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:14.456483086Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
